Class CHACallGraph

java.lang.Object
com.ibm.wala.util.graph.AbstractGraph<CGNode>
com.ibm.wala.util.graph.AbstractNumberedGraph<CGNode>
com.ibm.wala.ipa.callgraph.impl.BasicCallGraph<CHAContextInterpreter>
com.ibm.wala.ipa.callgraph.cha.CHACallGraph
All Implemented Interfaces:
CallGraph, EdgeManager<CGNode>, Graph<CGNode>, NodeManager<CGNode>, NumberedEdgeManager<CGNode>, NumberedGraph<CGNode>, NumberedNodeManager<CGNode>, Iterable<CGNode>
public class CHACallGraph extends BasicCallGraph<CHAContextInterpreter>
Call graph in which call targets are determined entirely based on an IClassHierarchy.

    boolean
    containsNode(CGNode N)
    This implementation is necessary because the underlying SparseNumberedGraph may not support node membership tests.

  • Method Details

    • init

      public void init(Iterable<Entrypoint> entrypoints) throws CancelException
      Builds the call graph data structures. The call graph will only include methods reachable from the provided entrypoints.
      Throws:
      CancelException

    • getClassHierarchy

      public IClassHierarchy getClassHierarchy()
      Returns:
      the governing class hierarchy for this call graph

    • getPossibleTargets

      public Set<CGNode> getPossibleTargets(CGNode node, CallSiteReference site)
      Description copied from interface: CallGraph
      Return the set of CGNodes that represent possible targets of a particular call site from a particular node

    • getNumberOfTargets

      public int getNumberOfTargets(CGNode node, CallSiteReference site)
      Returns:
      the number of nodes that the call site may dispatch to

    • getPossibleSites

      public Iterator<CallSiteReference> getPossibleSites(CGNode src, CGNode target)
      Returns:
      iterator of CallSiteReference, the call sites in a node that might dispatch to the target node.
